roa.docketEntryComment: PROB TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SENT

/CAL: TO ORDER DEFENDANT TRANSFERRED TO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X: THE ORIGINAL SENTENCE OF 10-21-10 ALLOWED FOR THE DEFENDANT TO FINISH HIS ONE YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/CTORD: THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE TRANSFERRED TO THE PROJECT 90 TREATMENT PROGRAM BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT FORTHWITH/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWINGREASON: THE DEFENDANT WILL FINISH HIS COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE THROUGH PROJECT90/   /

/CAL: SENTENCE/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 12 M/CTS: 58/4019NOTHALF/X: THE BALANCE OF DEFENDANT'S SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/X: WHEN A PROGRAM IS FOUND, DEFENSE MUST APPLY THE THE COURT FOR EARLY REALEASE FOR PROGRAM PLACEMENT/DNA/WS/11590/DTC/RX/VF4:200/X: THE COURTFINDS THE DEFENDANT HAS NO ABILITY TO PAY THE PROBATION COSTS, THE PRE-SENTENCE REPORT FEE, AND THE BOOKING FEE/SA2: INTERSECTION OF EDDY AND SCOTTSTREETS/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:ERP CONSIDERATION/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:10-20-10/REMA/VD:PRELIMINARY HEARING OF 10-20-10/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCE/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 10-26-10/987,2/BAIL:100,000/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:APD 1203,9PC TRANSFER/MO GRTD/CTORD:PROBATION TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA COUNTY/DAWT/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/LD:10-26-10/X:60TH DAY/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:ERP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
